title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report — AIAgent_05_2026
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 13 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 90.4%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 92.3%, and average score is 7.88/10. Total training hours are 188 and scaled cost is 9.6. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The training program for the course 'AI Agent & LLM Application Development' has shown strong metrics with a 100% completion rate and a 92.3% pass rate among 13 trainees. However, the overall effectiveness classification is marked as Risk, indicating potential areas for improvement despite high attendance and average scores.
insights: AI Agent & LLM Application Development has the strongest effectiveness score (89.47) in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainee(s) meet the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
1 course group(s) contain learners who need support based on score or attendance policy.
1 high-priority L&D NORM flag(s) were triggered.
AIAgent_05_2026 1 At least one learner is below pass threshold or attendance policy.
recommendations: Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources
Create a coaching plan for support-needed learners and review attendance issues with direct managers.
Implement 1:1 coaching for the identified trainee who requires additional support to meet the pass threshold.
Consider enhancing course content or delivery methods to address the effectiveness classification marked as Risk.
Monitor feedback responses closely to ensure continued engagement and satisfaction with the training program.

checklist.detail: Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sheets were mapped to simulated sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count × total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one assessment/pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
